name: intervals-icu-jan
description: intervals.icu MCP server — 133 tools across 16 domains. Lean profile (default) exposes 26 high-value tools (~9.5k tokens); set INTERVALS_PROFILE=full for the full surface (~43k tokens). Forked from mvilanova/intervals-mcp-server.
long_description: Model Context Protocol server exposing the intervals.icu REST API for personal use. Covers activities (CRUD, analytics, search), events (calendar CRUD + bulk ops), wellness (read + locked-aware writes), workout templates, sport settings, gear + reminders, athlete profile + training plan, weather, routes, and file operations (FIT/GPX/ZWO/MRC/ERG/TCX uploads + downloads). Two profiles: `lean` (default — 26 tools, ~9.5k tokens of tool schema, sized for Claude Desktop) and `full` (133 tools, ~43k tokens, full SDK coverage). Each write tool is gated by `permissions.ask` in Claude Code; wellness writes default `locked: true` to survive Oura/Garmin sync.

api_key.title: intervals.icu API key
api_key.description: Generate at intervals.icu → Settings → Developer Settings.

athlete_id.title: intervals.icu Athlete ID
athlete_id.description: Your numeric athlete ID, e.g. i12345 — visible in your profile URL.

profile.title: Tool profile
profile.description: lean = 26 high-value tools (~9.5k tokens of tool schema, recommended for Claude Desktop). full = all 133 tools (~43k tokens, recommended for power users / SDK-style scripting).
